content_fingerprint: ai2 publishes emo a new pretraining approach for mixture of experts models that develop emergent modularity the allen institute for ai has published research on hugging face describing emo a pretraining method for mixture of experts models that produces emergent modularity in learned representations potentially offering a more scalable and interpretable path for large language model development ai2 the allen institute for ai has posted a research blog on hugging face detailing emo emergent modularity via mixture of experts pretraining a novel pretraining approach designed to induce modular str
